landing.headline: Hola, I'm Lola.
landing.sub: Moving to Spain is a hundred small steps тАФ visas, padr├│n, taxes, healthcare тАФ and they only work in the right order. I've helped others make this move, and I'll walk it with you the whole way.
landing.subQuiet: Answer a few questions and I'll build your personal roadmap: real steps, real deadlines, nothing you don't need.
landing.greeting: Hola, I'm Lola. I'll build your roadmap right here as we talk тАФ real steps, real deadlines, nothing you don't need.
landing.welcomeBack: Welcome back тАФ your roadmap is {{pct}}% complete. Let's pick up where we left off.

done: That's everything I need тАФ your roadmap is ready.

fallback.question: Could you tell me about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyReask: Could you tell me a little more about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyPrefix: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. {{reask}}
fallback.turnFailed: Sorry тАФ that took longer than it should have. Your answer is still in the box; mind sending it again?

static.speaks_spanish: You can get by in English at first, but real life in Spain runs on Spanish тАФ so it helps to know your starting point. Where's your Spanish right now?
static.nationalities: Your passports set the route тАФ visas, registrations, even citizenship timelines hang on them. What passports does everyone in your household hold?
static.work_situation: How you'll earn points at which residence route fits. What'll your work situation be when you move?
static.employer_country_is_foreign: For remote employees, this points the visa route. Is your employer based outside Spain?
static.annual_income_eur_band: Some visa routes carry income requirements, so I'll check your plan against them тАФ a range is all I need. Which band fits?
static.has_spouse_or_partner: Family shape changes the paperwork тАФ and some of the requirements. Is a partner making this move with you?
static.partner_is_married: Spain treats registered relationships differently for family paperwork. Is yours legally registered? A marriage or civil partnership both count.
static.has_children: Kids bring school enrollment into the plan. Any children coming with you?
static.intends_long_stay: How much of the year you'll spend here changes your tax picture and which registrations apply. Will you be in Spain more than six months a year?
static.arrival_date: Very exciting тАФ moving to Spain! Let's start where you probably already are: roughly when are you hoping to arrive? Even just a month is fine тАФ it anchors every deadline on your roadmap.
static.has_spanish_address: Now, where will you land? An address unlocks the town-hall registration тАФ the padr├│n тАФ and buying brings its own cluster of steps. What's your housing plan?
static.owns_or_drives: Driving here can mean exchanging your licence тАФ or a Spanish exam тАФ depending on your country. Will anyone in the household be driving?
static.owns_property_in_spain: Property brings its own cluster of steps тАФ notary, registry, taxes. Do you own тАФ or plan to buy тАФ property in Spain?
static.region: Some steps vary by comunidad, so this makes your roadmap more precise. Which part of Spain will you settle in?
static.has_pets: Pets travel on their own rules and timelines. Any pets making this move with you?
static.foreign_assets_eur_band: Residents declare foreign assets above certain levels тАФ this just decides whether those steps apply to you. You only pick a range: roughly how much do you hold outside Spain?
static.previously_ex_spanish_colony_nationality: Nationals of former Spanish colonies are on a much shorter citizenship clock. Do you hold nationality from one тАФ most of Latin America, or the Philippines?
static.property_purchase: The purchase date anchors the notary, registry and tax deadlines. Roughly when did (or will) it complete? A month is enough.
static.wants_citizenship: This decides whether we plan the full citizenship track, or just keep your residence renewals tidy. Longer term, are you hoping to become a Spanish citizen?

has_spouse_or_partner.yes_registered: Yes тАФ married or civil partnership

has_spanish_address.bought: I own a home in Spain

roadmap.title: Your roadmap
roadmap.empty: Your steps will appear here as you answer.

final.question: One last thing тАФ is there anything else about your move you think I should know? It may shape your roadmap. Or skip straight to it.
